km.Gresham, Norfolk, England: ហ្គ្រីសាម, ណូរប៉ូលក, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.Gresham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可格雷沙姆
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche III是William de Braunche和Mrs William De Branche的兒子，於1140年出生在英國諾福爾可格雷沙姆。他於1170年之前與Mrs Richard de Braunche III在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1169年在他的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.Gresham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可格雷沙姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche III是William de Braunche和Mrs William De Branche的儿子，于1140年出生在英国諾福爾可格雷沙姆。他于1170年之前与Mrs Richard de Braunche III在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1169年在他的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Braunche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Marcel.

French: topographic name or nickname from Old French branche ‘branch’ (from Late Latin branca ‘foot, paw’), of uncertain application (compare German Zweig ); or a habitational name from (La) Branche, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare also Labranche .
English: variant of   Branch  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Zweig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Isadore, Yochanan, Akiva, Arie, Aron, Elchanan, Hyman, Moishe, Moshe, Shimon.  German Gerd, Hans, Manfred, Reinhold, Arnulf, Herta, Kurt.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German zwīg ‘branch, bough, twig, graft’, German Zweig, applied perhaps as a nickname for a new member in a family, offspring or as an occupational name for a horticultural expert. The Jewish surname is artificial. Compare Branch .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche III was born in 1140, in Gresham, Norfolk, England as the son of William de Braunche and Mrs William De Branche. He married Mrs Richard de Braunche III before 1170, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1169, in his hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche III est né en 1140, à Gresham, Norfolk, Angleterre, fils de William de Braunche et Mrs William De Branche. Il a épousé Mrs Richard de Braunche III avant 1170, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1169, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche III wurde 1140 in Gresham, Norfolk, England, als Sohn von William de Braunche und Mrs William De Branche geboren. Er hat vor 1170 in Europa Mrs Richard de Braunche III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1169 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche III è nato il nel 1140 nel Gresham, Norfolk, England come figlio di William de Braunche e Mrs William De Branche. Lui sposato Mrs Richard de Braunche III prima del 1170, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1169, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.Gresham, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクグレシャム
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche IIIは1140年にイギリスノーフォルクグレシャムでWilliam de BrauncheとMrs William De Brancheの息子として生まれた。1170年以前にヨーロッパでMrs Richard de Braunche IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1169年に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche III(은)는 1140년 영국 노르폴크 그레샤에서 William de Braunche(와)과 Mrs William De Branche의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1170년 이전 우럽에서 Mrs Richard de Braunche III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1169년 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche III nasceu em 1140, em Gresham, Norfolk, Inglaterra filho de William de Braunche e Mrs William De Branche. Ele casou-se com Mrs Richard de Braunche III antes 1170, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1169, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche III родился в 1140 г. в местности грешам, норфолк, Англия. Его родителей звали William de Braunche и Mrs William De Branche. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Richard de Braunche III перед 1170 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1169 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche III nació en 1140, en Gresham, Norfolk, Inglaterra como hijo de William de Braunche y Mrs William De Branche. Se casó con Mrs Richard de Braunche III antes de 1170, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1169, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años.
